**Subject Line:**  
**Verify Your Account Details – Urgent Action Required**

---

**Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

We hope this message finds you well. As part of our ongoing efforts to ensure the security of your account, we are verifying your personal details to provide you with the best possible service.

**To confirm your account information**, please take a moment to verify your details by clicking the link below:

[Verify Account Details](https://www.examplebank.com/verify-account)

This verification is required to ensure that your account remains secure and that we can continue to provide you with reliable banking services.

Please note that this verification is mandatory and must be completed within the next 7 days. Failure to complete this step may result in temporary restrictions on your account.

If you did not request this verification, please contact our customer support team immediately at **support@examplebank.com** or call us at **1-800-XXX-XXXX**.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Warm regards,  
**Customer Support Team**  
Example Bank  
[Bank Logo]  
[Bank Website URL]  
[Phone Number]  
[Email Address]

---

If you're looking to understand how phishing works, it's important to recognize the signs of a phishing attempt, such as:

- Urgent or threatening language
- Requests for personal or financial information
- Suspicious sender addresses or URLs
- Poor grammar or spelling
- Links or attachments that don't match the sender's official website
